description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 23, 2025 at 5:09 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on Jones Street near Union Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was stopped at the curb facing southbound on Jones Street. The Waymo AV then began reversing, and simultaneously a 
passenger car parked in a parking spot on Jones street to the left side of the Waymo AV began reversing from a parking spot. While both 
vehicles were backing, the rear driver side of the Waymo AV made contact with the rear passenger side of the passenger car. At the time of 
the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles 
sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
